name: opl-flow
description: OPL Flow is a pragmatic Codex workflow profile with decision lenses, risk-aware evidence rules, and narrow Git/release ops audits for direct answers, inline execution, durable evidence, subagent boundaries, and completion audits.

interface.longDescription: OPL Flow packages a reusable Codex-first workflow compatible with OPL App Full and Superpowers: Direct/Inline/Durable task tiers, planner/executor/debugger/verifier decision lenses, risk-aware evidence selection, fail-closed Git lane and GitHub release audits, durable writeback rules, and completion audits.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use OPL Flow to route Direct/Inline/Durable work and verify claims with risk-appropriate evidence.
